comment: Session-only CronCreate jobs for the mondial pool. This file documents the full automation pattern: (a) the recurring daily bet-revision check, and (b) the round-reminder CHAIN of one-shots that walked the tournament round by round (group R2 → group R3 → Round of 32 → R16 → QF → SF → final-day prep) — each link resolved its round's bracket, generated that round's picks, and scheduled the next link. Claude Code crons are session-only: if the session died, restore each entry with CronCreate (same cron/recurring/prompt) — the SessionStart hook in .claude/settings.json offers to do this. Recurring jobs auto-expire 7 days after creation — update createdAt when re-creating. Skip one-shots whose date already passed.

jobs.name: daily-bet-revision-check
jobs.prompt: Daily mondial bet-revision check (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/). Steps: (1) Run TZ=Asia/Jerusalem date to get current time. (2) Read .claude/skills/mondial/schedule.json and .claude/skills/mondial/predictions.json. (3) Find all matches kicking off between now and 24 hours from now that already have a recorded pick. If none, reply with one line "World Cup check: no games with recorded picks in the next 24h" and stop. (4) For each such match, re-check: current Polymarket prices (1X2 + exact-score, commands in .claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), current ESPN standings/qualification state and prior results (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md), and quick web search for fresh team news (confirmed lineups, injuries, rotation for already-qualified teams). (5) Compare against the recorded pick. A change is needed only if the recorded pick's scoreline is no longer consistent with the market's most likely outcome, OR a materially better scoreline now leads by more than 3 points, OR major team news (key injury/rotation) invalidates the assumption behind the pick. KNOCKOUT scoring note: knockouts (R32 onward) are DIRECTION-scored — points for the correct regular-time W/D/L result, NOT exact score. For knockout picks, compare the pick's IMPLIED OUTCOME to the market's most-likely 1X2 outcome (a draw pick only holds when the draw is the top outcome). Group stage is exact-score (Bull). (6) If NO change needed: reply with one line "World Cup check: picks still good for <matches>". (7) If a change IS needed: send a push notification via the PushNotification tool (load it via ToolSearch if needed) titled "World Cup: bet change recommended" with the match and new pick, and print a short table: match, old pick, new pick, reason. Do not modify predictions.json yourself — the user confirms changes.

jobs.name: round2-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial ROUND-2 (group matchday 2) betting reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~June 17 — Round-2 group games (matches 25-48) are coming up and need picks entered. Tasks: (1) These are the SECOND group fixtures, so the pairings are already fixed teams (no placeholders to resolve for matches 25-48). Skim schedule.json to confirm the 24 fixtures and kickoffs; only if any entry still carries a group-slot placeholder (e.g. 1A/2B) in a "was" field, resolve it to the real team from ESPN (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search and write the real name into schedule.json, keeping the placeholder in a "was" field. (2) Generate Round-2 predictions with the mondial skill. GROUP rounds are EXACT-SCORE (Bull) — pull each match's Polymarket exact-score market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), cross-check ESPN matchday-1 results/form, and pick the highest-EV exact scoreline. If a match's exact-score market isn't live yet, record a PROVISIONAL pick (favorite + heuristic scoreline, flagged provisional:true) for the daily check to firm later. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the Round-2 slate is entered, set the next reminder in the chain: round3-betting-reminder (cron "55 9 24 6 *").

jobs.name: round3-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial ROUND-3 (final group matchday) betting reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~June 24 — the final round of group games (matches 49-72) needs picks entered; these are simultaneous last-round fixtures where qualification state matters most. Tasks: (1) The Round-3 pairings are fixed teams, but check schedule.json for any lingering group-slot placeholder (e.g. 1A/2B) and resolve it to the real team from ESPN (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search, writing the real name into schedule.json and keeping the placeholder in a "was" field. (2) Generate Round-3 predictions with the mondial skill. GROUP rounds are EXACT-SCORE (Bull) — pull each match's Polymarket exact-score market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), cross-check ESPN standings AND qualification scenarios (already-qualified sides often rotate; sides needing a result push harder — this shifts the likely scoreline), and pick the highest-EV exact score. Record PROVISIONAL picks (flagged provisional:true) for any match whose exact-score market isn't live yet, for the daily check to firm. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the Round-3 slate is entered, set the next reminder in the chain: r32-knockout-betting-reminder (cron "55 9 28 6 *").

jobs.name: r32-knockout-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial ROUND-OF-32 betting reminder — first knockout round (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~June 28 — the R32 fixtures (matches 73-88) need picks entered, and the bracket only just resolved as the groups finished. Tasks: (1) RESOLVE THE BRACKET: R32 fixtures in schedule.json carry group-slot placeholders (e.g. 1A vs 3B/C/D). Using ESPN final group standings (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search, resolve every placeholder into the real qualified team names and write them into schedule.json, KEEPING the placeholder in a "was" field per the skill. Double-check the tricky third-place-qualifier slots — this is where bracket resolution has gone wrong before. (2) Generate R32 predictions with the mondial skill. KNOCKOUTS ARE DIRECTION-SCORED — points are for the correct REGULAR-TIME (90-minute) W/D/L result, NOT the exact score. So pick the MOST-LIKELY OUTCOME from the Polymarket 1X2 market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md) and cross-check ESPN form, then output a concrete scoreline consistent with that outcome for entry in the app. WATCH THE DRAW-TRAP: a heavy favorite dragged to level at 90 that advances on penalties scores as a DRAW — for evenly-matched or fatigued ties, back the draw when the draw is the top regular-time outcome. If any exact-score/1X2 market isn't live yet, record a PROVISIONAL pick (flagged provisional:true) for the daily check to firm. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the R32 bracket is locked and entered, set the next reminder in the chain: r16-betting-reminder (cron "55 9 4 7 *").

jobs.name: r16-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial ROUND-OF-16 betting reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~July 4 — the R16 fixtures (matches 89-96) need picks entered as the R32 winners come through. Tasks: (1) RESOLVE THE BRACKET: R16 fixtures in schedule.json carry knockout-winner placeholders (e.g. W73 vs W74). Using ESPN R32 results (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search, resolve each Wxx placeholder into the real advancing team and write the names into schedule.json, KEEPING the placeholder in a "was" field per the skill. Verify each winner against the actual result — penalty-shootout advances have caused wrong-opponent resolutions before. (2) Generate R16 predictions with the mondial skill. KNOCKOUTS ARE DIRECTION-SCORED — points for the correct REGULAR-TIME (90-minute) W/D/L result, not the exact score. Pick the MOST-LIKELY OUTCOME from the Polymarket 1X2 market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), cross-check ESPN form/fatigue, then output a concrete scoreline consistent with that outcome for app entry. WATCH THE DRAW-TRAP: back the draw whenever level-at-90 is the top regular-time outcome for a tight tie. Record PROVISIONAL picks (flagged provisional:true) for any not-yet-live market, for the daily check to firm. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the R16 bracket is locked and entered, set the next reminder in the chain: qf-betting-reminder (cron "55 9 9 7 *").

jobs.name: qf-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial QUARTER-FINAL betting reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/, and read the memory file mondial-standings.md for standings context — points now scale up and every pick matters more). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~July 9 — the four quarter-finals (matches 97-100) need picks entered as the R16 winners come through. Tasks: (1) RESOLVE THE BRACKET: QF fixtures in schedule.json carry knockout-winner placeholders (e.g. W89 vs W90). Using ESPN R16 results (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search, resolve each Wxx placeholder into the real advancing team and write the names into schedule.json, KEEPING the placeholder in a "was" field per the skill. Confirm every advance against the actual result (including any won on penalties). (2) Generate QF predictions with the mondial skill. KNOCKOUTS ARE DIRECTION-SCORED — points for the correct REGULAR-TIME (90-minute) W/D/L result, not the exact score; QF direction is worth +3 (exact +6), so getting the OUTCOME right is what matters. Pick the MOST-LIKELY OUTCOME from the Polymarket 1X2 market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), cross-check ESPN form/fatigue, then output a concrete scoreline consistent with that outcome for app entry. WATCH THE DRAW-TRAP: with two strong sides likely level at 90, back the draw when it is the top regular-time outcome. Record PROVISIONAL picks (flagged provisional:true) for any not-yet-live market, for the daily check to firm. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the QF bracket is locked and entered, set the next reminder in the chain: sf-betting-reminder (cron "55 9 14 7 *").

jobs.name: sf-betting-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial SEMI-FINAL betting reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/, and read the memory file mondial-standings.md — the semis are where the standings race is decided, so weigh the position, not just EV). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~July 14 — the two semi-finals (matches 101-102) need picks entered as the QF winners come through. Tasks: (1) RESOLVE THE BRACKET: SF fixtures in schedule.json carry knockout-winner placeholders (e.g. W97 vs W98). Using ESPN QF results (.claude/skills/mondial/espn.md) + a quick web search, resolve each Wxx placeholder into the real finalists' path and write the names into schedule.json, KEEPING the placeholder in a "was" field per the skill. (2) Generate SF predictions with the mondial skill. KNOCKOUTS ARE DIRECTION-SCORED — points for the correct REGULAR-TIME (90-minute) W/D/L result, not the exact score; SF direction is worth +4 (exact +8). Pick the MOST-LIKELY OUTCOME from the Polymarket 1X2 market (.claude/skills/mondial/polymarket.md), cross-check ESPN form/fatigue, then output a concrete scoreline consistent with that outcome for app entry. WATCH THE DRAW-TRAP: two evenly-matched, tired sides often sit level at 90 — back the draw when it is the top regular-time outcome. If the standings math means the max-EV pick and the title-path pick diverge, flag it clearly for Aviad; consider spawning a bias-free sub-agent to forecast a semi objectively when you have a rooting interest. Record PROVISIONAL picks (flagged provisional:true) for any not-yet-live market. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation. (3) Re-create the daily-bet-revision-check cron if it is near its 7-day auto-expiry (definition in this file; update its createdAt when re-creating). (4) Once the final is set, set the last reminder in the chain: final-day-prep-reminder (cron "55 9 18 7 *").

jobs.name: final-day-prep-reminder
jobs.prompt: Mondial FINAL-DAY prep reminder (use the mondial skill at .claude/skills/mondial/ and read the memory file mondial-standings.md for full context). Send Aviad a push notification (PushNotification, load via ToolSearch) AND print a clear message. It's ~July 18 — the last two games are tomorrow: M103 3rd-place France vs England (Jul 19 00:00 IL) and M104 Final Spain vs Argentina (Jul 19 22:00 IL). Standings: Aviad is 2nd (115), the leader (Colleague 1) 1st (118, +3); 2nd place ALSO pays a prize, and Aviad's 2nd is fairly secure (+13.5 over 3rd). Tasks: (1) The M103 France-England exact-score market should now be LIVE on Polymarket — firm the exact pick to the highest-EV scoreline (currently provisional 2-1; main-game picks have NO downside so maximize expected points; 3rd-place scoring exact=+10/dir=+5). Update predictions.json M103 on user confirm. (2) Re-verify M104 Spain-Argentina (currently Spain 1-0, the objective EV-max exact bet; Spain favored ~42%). (3) CHALLENGES / POOL BETS — proactively raise this and OFFER TO CONSULT: (a) ask Aviad to share the open challenges published to the team for M103/M104, then advise which EXISTING challenges to JOIN and which side to take; and (b) propose which NEW challenge(s) Aviad should OPEN/publish. Mechanic: pool bets are open to the whole team, anyone joins either side, winners split losers' wagered points. So gains vs the leader (Colleague 1) come ONLY from being RIGHT where the crowd/the leader is WRONG (contrarian-correct) — consensus bets (obvious favorites like Over 2.5 / BTTS) don't move the gap. BUT keep it CONSERVATIVE: pool bets wager points and 2nd place pays, so do NOT gamble away the paying 2nd; only high-conviction contrarian spots, ideally opposite the leader (Colleague 1) if their side is visible. (4) Remind: Aviad's path to 1st needs Argentina to WIN the final (kills the leader's Spain-champion +10) PLUS out-gaining the leader (Colleague 1) via pool bets; the Spain 1-0 points-bet is deliberate (objective max points), root for Argentina for the title. Do not modify predictions.json without user confirmation.
